abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} alongside the commando to wage war or defend others in a time of war, you may reroll any dice. When the commando @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray}, or when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection} by seeking out or making contact with someone in need of the commando's services, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When the commando makes a move by shooting at a specific target, take +1 momentum on a hit. If they score a miss, the commando sets their sights on their quarry and marks it. The next time they make a move to shoot at the same target, you may reroll any dice and take +2 momentum on a hit.

When the commando makes a move by holding foes at bay, employing a bold counter-attack, or charging into close quarters, you may roll +their spirit, but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1).
